content:
Given the undirected dynamic graph with the edges:
[(2, 6, 0), (0, 5, 1), (3, 8, 2), (3, 6, 4), (0, 2, 6), (0, 8, 6), (2, 5, 13), (4, 5, 13), (6, 7, 14), (6, 9, 15), (0, 3, 16), (4, 6, 17), (2, 3, 19), (4, 7, 19)],

We need to find the nodes linked with node 4 exactly at time 19.

First, we will scan each edge and collect the other node whenever the time t matches the queried time AND one of the nodes matches the queried node.

* Edge (2, 6, 0) has node 2 and time 0. -> Ignore.
* Edge (0, 5, 1) has node 0 and time 1. -> Ignore.
* Edge (3, 8, 2) has node 3 and time 2. -> Ignore.
* Edge (3, 6, 4) has node 3 and time 4. -> Ignore.
* Edge (0, 2, 6) has node 0 and time 6. -> Ignore.
* Edge (0, 8, 6) has node 0 and time 6. -> Ignore.
* Edge (2, 5, 13) has node 2 and time 13. -> Ignore.
* Edge (4, 5, 13) has node 4 and time 13. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (6, 7, 14) has node 6 and time 14. -> Ignore.
* Edge (6, 9, 15) has node 6 and time 15. -> Ignore.
* Edge (0, 3, 16) has node 0 and time 16. -> Ignore.
* Edge (4, 6, 17) has node 4 and time 17. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (2, 3, 19) has node 2 and time 19. -> Ignore.
* Edge (4, 7, 19) has node 4 and time 19. -> Add node 7.

The nodes matched are 5 and 7.

Answer: [5, 7]
